description: A senior citizen is applying for a property tax abatement (reduction) based on their age and income.

nodes.task_description: Receive the abatement application and supporting documents (proof of age and income).

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the complete application package.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the applicant meets the eligibility requirements for the abatement program.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the applicant's age and income are within the program limits.

nodes.task_description: Approve the abatement and apply the reduction to the citizen's property tax bill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the application and the system recalculates the tax bill at the lower amount.
